# kCTTypesetterOptionAllowUnboundedLayout

**Global Variable**

A key that specifies whether the text system lays out text that requires unreasonable effort.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCTTypesetterOptionAllowUnboundedLayout: CFString
```

## Discussion

Proper Unicode layout of some text requires unreasonable effort. By default, the text system avoids expending this effort. To create a typesetter that always typesets the text, regardless of the amount of work needed, call [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTTypesetterCreateWithAttributedStringAndOptions(_:_:)] and set this option to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue].

The value for this key must be a `CFBooleanRef`. The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanFalse].

## Constants

- **kCTTypesetterOptionForcedEmbeddingLevel**: A key that specifies the embedding level of the typesetter’s text.
- **kCTTypesetterOptionDisableBidiProcessing**
